parameters.name: file
parameters.description: File identifier to read logs from

parameters.name: per_page
parameters.description: Number of log entries per page (default: 25)

parameters.name: severity
parameters.description: Filter by log severity level: debug, info, notice, warning, error, critical, alert, emergency

parameters.name: query
parameters.description: Search string to filter log entries by content

parameters.name: direction
parameters.description: Sort direction: asc or desc (default: desc — newest first)
